_notes: Do Not Contact list. Add entries to block leads. All matches are BLOCKED by bouncer_agent.js. Digits-only for phones (no dashes/spaces).
_how_to_add_email: Add exact email string to emails array
_how_to_add_name: Add full name as 'First Last' — case insensitive match
_how_to_add_domain: Add domain only — e.g. 'competitor.com' — blocks all emails from that firm
